---
title: "Phát hiện"
jupyter: python3
---

## Pattern 1 — Tour Design

TODO: definition, occurrence (~10/12), evidence quotes, implication

## Pattern 2 — Social Dependency

TODO

## Pattern 3 — Identity Mismatch

TODO

## Patterns bổ sung

TODO: Cảnh giác văn hoá dàn dựng, Phụ nữ tâm linh

## 2 Signals mới cần explore

TODO: Vietnamese Studies / Foreign Visitors, Destination Credibility
